series_metadata.series_title: INVESTIGATION FILES - REGISTRATION REVOKED, SUSPENDED, HAD REPRIMAND, OR REFUSED RENEWAL
series_metadata.series_description: Investigation files dealing with registrants that have had registration revoked, suspended, have had a reprimand, or have been refused renewal. These actions have had a public hearing prior to completion.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 2 years after the last action taken by the Board or in case of disciplianry action, 2 years afer the appeal process is exhausted., Paper: Wastepaper
